display.purpose: The 'Today' overview title; the largest type in the app.

title.purpose: Detail-panel entity names and dialog titles.

label.purpose: Field labels, counts, metadata, kbd hints. Sentence case.

shadows.name: raised
shadows.purpose: Primary buttons only: a 1px lift on the single most actionable element.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Popovers and the command palette, floating above a blurred backdrop.

motion.name: ease-out-quint
motion.purpose: Entrance reveals (section rise, panel slide, palette open).

motion.name: duration-enter
motion.purpose: Panel slide and overview section rise; disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single saturated action per context (New Chat, Start a chat).
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #e33f86; color: #fff; border: none; border-radius: 8px; padding: 10px 16px; font: 600 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(80,24,84,0.10); cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #d52f78; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #db2777; }

components.name: Chip Button
components.description: Bordered, transparent secondary action and filter (Confirm, model picker).
components.css: .ds-chip { background: transparent; color: #501854; border: 1px solid #e7c1dc; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 6px 14px; font: 500 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-chip:hover { background: rgba(241,196,230,0.5); } .ds-chip:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #db2777; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Collection search field with a leading glyph; placeholder holds contrast.
components.css: .ds-search { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; height: 40px; padding: 0 12px; background: rgba(250,243,251,0.4); border: 1px solid #e7c1dc; border-radius: 8px; } .ds-search input { flex: 1; border: none; background: transparent; outline: none; color: #501854; font: 400 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-search input::placeholder { color: #ac1668; } .ds-search:focus-within { box-shadow: 0 0 0 1px #db2777; }

components.name: Entity Row
components.description: Selectable list row: glyph tile + title + subtitle, optional trailing chip.
components.css: .ds-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; width: 100%; padding: 10px 12px; border: none; background: transparent; border-radius: 8px; text-align: left; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.15s ease; } .ds-row:hover { background: rgba(241,196,230,0.4); } .ds-glyph { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #f1c4e6; color: #77347c; font: 600 11px Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; flex: none; } .ds-row-text { min-width: 0; } .ds-row-title { display: block; color: #501854; font: 500 0.875rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-row-sub { display: block; color: #ac1668; font: 400 0.75rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Chip
components.description: Project status and overdue states; a dot or icon plus a word, never colour alone.
components.css: .ds-status { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; background: #f1c4e6; color: #77347c; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 4px 10px; font: 500 0.75rem Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #e33f86; }

narrative.overview: Inkstone is the desk you return to at dusk: a private, warm-lit place where the day's loose thoughts settle into something you can find again. The whole system is built around one committed magenta that behaves like lamplight, a single warm glow that anchors a near-monochrome field of plums and blushes. It is characterful without being loud, and unhurried by construction: generous whitespace, calm lists over busy cards, and a quiet confidence that the work is yours and stays private. Depth comes from warm tonal steps and thin hairlines, not heavy shadows; type does the heavy lifting with one Inter family, and the magenta is rationed so its appearances always mean something.
keyCharacteristics: One committed magenta as the only accent; everything else is a warm plum neutral.
Tonal layering (sidebar → surface → card) over drop shadows.
Lists, grouping, and whitespace instead of card grids.
One typeface (Inter), hierarchy through weight and size, not ornament.
Full light and dark parity; the same tokens flip under [data-theme].

rules.name: The One Ink Rule
rules.body: Magenta is the only accent. New categories earn distinction through icon + label + tonal soft-pink, never a new hue.

rules.name: The Warm Neutral Rule
rules.body: There are no true grays. Every 'gray' is a plum or magenta tint; muted text is a darkened brand hue (#ac1668), not #888.

rules.name: The Fixed-Scale Rule
rules.body: App UI uses a fixed rem scale, never fluid clamp(). Headings must not shrink in a sidebar or panel.

rules.name: The Sentence-Case Rule
rules.body: Section headers and labels are sentence case. No tracked all-caps eyebrow above every section.

rules.name: The No Ghost-Card Rule
rules.body: Never pair a 1px border with a wide (>=16px blur) drop shadow on the same element. Resting surfaces layer tonally.

dos: Do ration Ink Magenta (#e33f86) to one primary action or the current selection per context.
Do convey depth by tonal layering (petal → blush → card) and hairlines, not drop shadows.
Do distinguish entity kinds with icon + label and a uniform soft-pink glyph tile.
Do keep muted text at the darkened brand hue (#ac1668) so subtitles clear 4.5:1 on warm surfaces.
Do prefer grouped lists with generous whitespace; reach for a card only when content is truly distinct.
Do give every animation a prefers-reduced-motion alternative.
donts: Don't ship the generic SaaS dashboard: identical card grids, hero-metric templates, Notion/Linear sameness.
Don't drift toward corporate enterprise: navy-and-gray, stock photography, buzzword copy.
Don't build a cluttered power-tool: toolbar soup, dense nested menus, everything visible at once.
Don't introduce a second saturated hue. Categories earn distinction through icon, label, and tint.
Don't pair a 1px border with a wide drop shadow (the 'ghost card'); pick one.
Don't round cards past 16px, encode meaning in color alone, set a tracked all-caps eyebrow above every section, or use em dashes in copy.
